Careers

ImmuneChem is a company that specializes in the development of novel bioreagent tools to meet the needs of the life science marketplace.

The company is looking for individuals whom are capable of working either independently or in a team based environment. Successful candidates should be extremely motivated and committed in assisting the company achieve its main objectives.

If you are interested in joining our team, review the list of current openings and send your resume to info@immunechem.com . Please note that only candidates selected for an interview will be contacted.

Available Positions
1. Lab Manager and Research Technologist

ImmuneChem Pharmaceuticals Inc. is a private-owned biotechnology company based in Burnaby specializing in the research and development of antibodies and assay kits.

Position Description:

The successful applicant will be expected to work, under minimal supervision, to manage and oversee the day-to-day operation and maintenance of the research laboratory; and to assist Senior Management in maintaining efficient, cost-effective lab activities.
